name: Scrambled Tofu
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Silken or soft tofu, drained
recipeInstructions:
Great for brunch or a light supper dish, this recipe
can easily be doubled to serve 4 to 6. Silken tofu
results in a very soft-cooked texture, while soft tofu
will be slightly firmer.
NOTE: Turmeric will give a faint yellow color to the
mixture, but will not contribute significantly to the
taste.
1. In a large skillet or wok, heat the oil over medium-high heat.
2. Add the onion and garlic, stirring until the onions turn light brown, about 4 to 5 minutes.
3. Add the mushrooms and red bell pepper, and continue sauteing for another 3 minutes, stirring frequently.
4. Stir in the tofu, oregano, and turmeric (if using).
5. Cook over medium-high heat for an additional 3 minutes, stirring frequently.
6. Stir in the scallion greens, olives, nori (if using), soy sauce, and pepper to taste.
7. Pass optional hot sauce.
